subcodes.first_line: O remnant of the companions of the Most Manifest Beauty, who abide within that impregnable stronghold, ye who are intoxicated with the wine of God's love, remembrance of those souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بقیه اصحاب جمال مبین در حصن حصین آن مخمور باده محبت الله یادگار آن نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
